# Light Water Capital

> Private capital management and family office based in Corydon, Indiana.

Light Water Capital is a private investment firm that manages capital for a select number of clients with a long-term, conviction-based approach. We combine quantitative research with fundamental judgment. We focus on public equities and quantitative strategies, building concentrated positions where we have high conviction.

## Pages

- Home: https://lightwaterdispatch.com/
- The Dispatch (blog): https://lightwaterdispatch.com/dispatch/

## Recent Articles

- [We Let AI Iterate on a Trading Strategy for 20 Minutes](https://lightwaterdispatch.com/dispatch/ai-autoresearch-trading-strategy-backtesting/) — March 2026. Applying Karpathy's autoresearch loop to quantitative strategy development - 30 autonomous experiments, zero human intervention. AI improved returns from 133.8% to 290.6%.
- [Why We Open-Sourced Our Trading Backtester](https://lightwaterdispatch.com/dispatch/july-backtester/) — March 2026. The story behind July, our open-source Python backtesting engine with Monte Carlo simulation, walk-forward analysis, and regime detection.
- [Welcoming Our Spring 2026 Quant Strategy Interns](https://lightwaterdispatch.com/dispatch/intern-announcement/) — March 2026. Chang Liu (Johns Hopkins) and Alice Li (Columbia Engineering) join as Quant Strategist Interns.

## Investment Philosophy

- Concentration over diversification: fewer, deeply researched positions
- Quantitative rigor: every thesis tested against data
- Long time horizons: underwriting investments over years, not quarters
- Aligned incentives: firm capital invested alongside clients

## Open Source

- July Backtester: https://github.com/zachisit/july-backtester — Professional-grade Python backtesting engine with Monte Carlo, walk-forward analysis, parameter sensitivity, and regime detection. MIT licensed.

## About

- Location: Corydon, Indiana, USA
- Type: Private capital management, family office
- Focus: Long-term investment, quantitative research, portfolio construction, public equities
